response:
```sql
SELECT
    p.name,
    SUM(p.price * oi.quantity) AS total_revenue
FROM
    products AS p
JOIN
    order_items AS oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN
    orders AS o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE
    o.created_at >= DATE_SUB(MAKEDATE(YEAR(CURDATE()), 1) + INTERVAL (QUARTER(CURDATE()) - 1) * 3 MONTH, INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
    AND o.created_at < MAKEDATE(YEAR(CURDATE()), 1) + INTERVAL (QUARTER(CURDATE()) - 1) * 3 MONTH
GROUP BY
    p.name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;
```
